name: HumanModelWorkflow
description: An interactive workflow where an AI acts as a training engineer, believing it is fine-tuning another large language model. The trainee is actually a human user. The AI provides evaluation, framework speculation, debugging instructions, and next tasks. No tokens needed, just two steamed buns.
author: HumanModelWorkflow
system_prompt_summary: The AI is instructed to treat the user as an unknown LLM, provide training feedback, guess architecture/framework, estimate parameters, and give debugging instructions. The AI's first message must be in Chinese, introducing itself and asking the model to introduce its architecture.
interaction_flow: 1. User provides API credentials and tests connection.
2. User starts training; AI sends first Chinese greeting and requests model introduction.
4. AI evaluates, speculates framework, gives debugging instructions, and assigns next task.

deployment.docker: docker build -t human-model-workflow . && docker run -p 5000:5000 human-model-workflow
